nasb.text: “Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon has devoured me and crushed me, He has set me down like an empty vessel; He has swallowed me like a monster, He has filled his stomach with my delicacies; He has washed me away.

esv.text: “Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon has devoured me; he has crushed me; he has made me an empty vessel; he has swallowed me like a monster; he has filled his stomach with my delicacies; he has rinsed me out.

cnv.text: 以色列人說：“巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒吞滅了我們， 使我們十分混亂， 又使我們成為空的器皿； 他像怪獸把我們吞下，他的肚塞滿了我們的美物， 他卻把我們吐出去。”

ccb.text: 以色列人说： “巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒吞噬我们、击垮我们， 把我们洗劫一空。 他像海怪一样吞吃我们， 饱餐我们的美物， 然后把我们赶走。”
